tasks.task: Seed the final closure consolidation workgraph with twenty four bounded Atlas audit nodes.

Add regression evidence that final readback public safety status cannot remain pending after closure.

Add branch cleanup regression evidence for completed consolidation node handoffs.

Add regression evidence for aggregate no promotion and Command agreement rollups.

Add ledger regression evidence covering pull request numbers merge heads and check states.
Generate the final operator summary from the final recommendation readback and closure fixture.
Add operator summary regression evidence for completed nodes next action and no promotion wording.
Add one command schema validation over every node evidence JSON file in the completed wave.
Add regression evidence for schema validation coverage across node gates run links and readbacks.
Add a repository guard preventing committed local build artifacts such as atlas binaries.
Add guard regression evidence that build artifacts are reported before promotion closure.
Add wait state telemetry for long running Windows continuous integration checks.
Add telemetry regression evidence for pending passing and failing Windows check states.
Generate a compaction resume prompt from the latest consolidation recommendation readback.
Add compaction resume regression evidence for exact next node and return gate preservation.

Add dashboard regression evidence for Atlas Foundry Promoter Command and Sentinel bindings.
Create a final no promotion and no RSI assertion fixture across all completed nodes.

Add exporter regression evidence and final consolidation closure readback for all nodes.
